personality_one_liner: An AI Operating System for real estate that feels like a premium luxury tool—deep, confident, minimal, and driven by intelligent insight rather than traditional data rows.

spacing.rule: Generous spacing. Huge empty spaces. Allow the UI to breathe. Never crowd components.

do's: Use frosted glass over abstract emerald/gold gradient or cinematic imagery.
Apply glass to floating bottom tab bar, sticky headers, and hero widgets.
Ensure backdrop layer has a dark translucent tint (rgba(6, 11, 20, 0.75)) beneath the blur for perfect readability.
Keep text high-contrast (pure white) over glass.
dont's: Do not over-blur every card on the screen. Limit to 2-3 prominent glass surfaces per view.
Never blur body text regions or form inputs.
Avoid white/light glass; stick to dark smoked glass.

screens.name: AI Employee Home
screens.purpose: The daily briefing and command center telling the user exactly what to do next instead of presenting raw data.

states.loading: A dark, cinematic screen with a softly breathing, glowing emerald/gold orb in the center.
states.empty: A clean view with an abstract gold/emerald light leak, reading 'All properties stable. No actions required today.'
states.error: A minimal glass dialog reading 'Lost connection to SPP Brain.' with a subtle gold 'Reconnect' button.

screens.layout: 1. Hero Section: Edge-to-edge subtle gradient background (deep navy to soft emerald/gold light leak at top). A large 'Smart Greeting' display (e.g., 'Good morning. 2 actions need your attention.'). 2. Health Ring / Snapshot: A premium frosted glass widget showing 'Property Health' with a glowing emerald circular progress indicator. 3. AI Decisions Feed: A vertical stack of floating 'Action Cards' (e.g., Predictive Maintenance alert) with thin glass borders and gold accents for priority items. 4. Floating Action / Navigation: A glassmorphic bottom tab bar (max 4 tabs: Home, Properties, Unified Brain, Analytics) hovering above the screen edge.

property_hero_architecture.alt: Dark cinematic modern architecture with elegant curves

ai_glow_light_leak.alt: Abstract golden and emerald light leak on deep black background

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Luxury Theme: Use the deep navy surface background (#060B14) as the base layer, preventing absolute black.
Implement the 'Arc Browser / Linear' aesthetic by using the Geist typography family exclusively. Respect the strict typography scale (Large Title 28-32).
For the AI Employee Home Screen, incorporate an atmospheric glowing background (using the ai_glow_light_leak image) with a heavy blur and dark overlay so it feels like a subtle pulse, not a photo.
Implement heavy glassmorphism for widgets and the tab bar. Always back the glass with a minimum 70% opacity dark tint (rgba(6,11,20,0.75)) to guarantee text contrast against the glow.
Do not use traditional table/CRUD lists. Format the 'AI Decisions Feed' as individual, beautifully spaced premium cards floating over the background.
Use Premium Gold (#D4AF37) strictly for accents or primary interactive elements, and Soft Emerald (#50C878) for the AI pulse and health indicators.
Only 4 tabs in the bottom navigation: Home, Properties, Unified Brain (Chat), Analytics.
